series_metadata.series_description: These files include all research projects conducted either internally or externally as they relate to statutory requirements and internal operations of the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, .. ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: electronic files no longer of administrative value
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
